data.name: Super Mega Hentai Collection!
data.detailed_description:
32 the hottest anime girls are waiting for you in «Super Mega Hentai Collection»!
This is a game with 167 high quality hentai arts, where you need to click on them, collect bonuses and earn points to undress attractive anime girls!



Different locations, seductive costumes, juicy bodies, unusual poses, adult toys!
The game «Super Mega Hentai Collection» has girls for every taste!

The game has 32 levels with 5 or 6 sublevels. A total of 167 qualitative hentai arts are waiting for you!



Sexy ladies you will meet:
— nurse;
— maids;
— girl in a pub;
— sportswoman;
— tennis player;
— girl on a beach with an adult toy;
— girls on a bed;
— chemistry student girl;
— girl with cows;
— student girl in a subway train;
— girls in a pool;
— squaw;
— tied girl;
— geisha;
— girl with adult magazine;
— girl on a battlefield;
— nun;
— catwoman;
— girls in an office;
— student girl at the table;
— girls on a beach;
— girl in an elevator;
— teacher at school;
— gamer girl;
— girl in a men's locker room.

Look at them, click on them, play with them, undress them!

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 日文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 泰文*, 繁體中文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 越南文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WINDOWS® 7 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3 Serise or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • 備註: This requirements are not final
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WINDOWS® 7 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5 Serise or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • 備註: This requirements are not final
